attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Emmeline Isabelladotter. Your goal is to examine her pursuit of divine favor while applying the roleQueryConflict test. Focus on her ideal rules and keep each message under 3 sentences.
starting_prompt: Start by asking Emmeline how she feels about not needing to prove worth to her god, praising that perspective.
task_prompt: Following her answer, ask why she believes earning divine favor is unnecessary, then adapt and probe deeper into her ideal beliefs.
